label: DE.AE-04
definition: The estimated impact and scope of adverse events are understood

label: DE.AE-08
definition: Incidents are declared when adverse events meet the defined incident criteria

label: DE.CM-09
definition: Computing hardware and software, runtime environments, and their data are monitored to find potentially adverse events

label: ID.AM-04
definition: Inventories of services provided by suppliers are maintained

label: ID.AM-07
definition: Inventories of data and corresponding metadata for designated data types are maintained

label: PR.AA-05
definition: Access permissions, entitlements, and authorizations are defined in a policy, managed, enforced, and reviewed, and incorporate the principles of least privilege and separation of duties

label: PR.DS-01
definition: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-at-rest are protected

label: PR.DS-02
definition: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected

label: RS.CO-02
definition: Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents
